headline: The Weekly Closeout: Gabe’s in search of top leadership and Home Depot’s latest acquisition
summary: After avoiding bankruptcy, the off-pricer’s CEO and a few CFOs have left. Meanwhile, the home improvement retailer bought Mingledorff’s.

headline: In the age of AI, Home Depot’s stores have ‘never been more relevant’
summary: While the retailer has been ramping up its AI-powered offerings, it aims to provide a frictionless experience across a customer’s shopping journey, wherever that may be.
